description: Sector overlay for manufacturers, processors, product makers, packaging/labelling workflows, regulated consumer products, origin claims, quality controls, and environmental documentation in Canada.

metadata.scope: Canada-only sector overlay controls for Manufacturing. Intended to be used with canada_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Canadian federal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. Provincial/territorial obligations may apply and are not exhaustively encoded. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Consumer product safety acts and regulations
Consumer Packaging and Labelling Act guidance
Product of Canada and Made in Canada claims guidance

rules.title: Consumer-product safety or regulated-product control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for safety, hazard, recall, incident, or Health Canada regulated-product controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Health Canada consumer product safety acts and regulations

rules.title: Packaging and labelling compliance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for packaging, labelling, declaration, net quantity, dealer identity, or required consumer-product label evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Competition Bureau Consumer Packaging and Labelling Act guidance

rules.title: Origin and product-claim controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for Product of Canada, Made in Canada, country-of-origin, or misleading representation controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Competition Bureau Product of Canada and Made in Canada claims guidance

rules.title: Environmental or hazardous-substance controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for environmental, hazardous substance, waste, emissions, or CEPA-linked controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, provincial/territorial variations, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
